holdings.infoBox: XES is an equity ETF with a total of 34 individual holdings. The top holdings are Solaris Energy Infrastructure stock at 5.39%, Kodiak Gas Services at 4.67%, Cactus at 4.57%, SLB N.V. at 4.26%, and Patterson-UTI Energy at 4.15%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR S&P Oil & Gas Equipment & Services ETF (XES) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in energy equity. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of companies in the oil & gas equipment and services sub-industry of the S&P Total Market Index. XES was launched on Jun 19, 2006 and is issued by State Street.
infoTable: S&P Oil & Gas Equipment & Services Select Industry Index
